description: Configure Jitsi Meet to require internal authentication for moderators while allowing guest access. The configuration in /home/ga/jitsi/.env must be updated to set ENABLE_AUTH=1, AUTH_TYPE=internal, and ENABLE_GUESTS=1. Register a moderator user named 'admin' with password 'Moderator2024!'. Verify the setup at http://localhost:8080/SecureDomainTest and save a confirmation report to /home/ga/jitsi/auth_config_report.txt.
